com.pax.poslink.peripheries

Interface POSLinkPrinter.GreyLevel

  • Enclosing class:
    POSLinkPrinter

    public static interface POSLinkPrinter.GreyLevel
    Grey level for print color

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int DEFAULT
      Default is HIGHER_TWO_LAYER_THERMAL, the highest level.
      static int HIGHER_TWO_LAYER_THERMAL
      Two-layer thermal printing, higher gray level than 3
      static int HIGHEST_PERCENTAGE
      [50~500] -Gray level is set according to percentage of default value.
      static int LOWEST_PERCENTAGE
      [50~500] -Gray level is set according to percentage of default value.
      static int STANDARD 
      static int TWO_LAYER_THERMAL
      Two-layer thermal printing

    • Field Detail

      • TWO_LAYER_THERMAL

        static final int TWO_LAYER_THERMAL
        Two-layer thermal printing
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • HIGHER_TWO_LAYER_THERMAL

        static final int HIGHER_TWO_LAYER_THERMAL
        Two-layer thermal printing, higher gray level than 3
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • LOWEST_PERCENTAGE

        static final int LOWEST_PERCENTAGE
        [50~500] -Gray level is set according to percentage of default value. If it is 50, then set gray level to be 50% of default value; If it is 500, then set grey level to be 500% of default value.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • HIGHEST_PERCENTAGE

        static final int HIGHEST_PERCENTAGE
        [50~500] -Gray level is set according to percentage of default value. If it is 50, then set gray level to be 50% of default value; If it is 500, then set grey level to be 500% of default value.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • DEFAULT

        static final int DEFAULT
        Default is HIGHER_TWO_LAYER_THERMAL, the highest level.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • STANDARD

        static final int STANDARD
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values
